title: Load Schedule
description: List what the building runs, and for how long, so the array can be sized.

steps.title: Add appliances
steps.description: Each load carries a wattage and daily hours.
steps.voiceScript: Add each appliance with its wattage and how many hours it runs.
steps.captionText: Add each appliance with its wattage and how many hours it runs.

steps.title: Daily energy
steps.description: The total drives the PV, battery and inverter sizing.
steps.voiceScript: The daily energy total drives the array, battery and inverter sizing.
steps.captionText: The daily energy total drives the array, battery and inverter sizing.

steps.title: Run the design
steps.description: Loads, PV, battery, inverter, MPPT, cables, BOQ, economics.
steps.voiceScript: Run the design. The engine sizes everything from this schedule.
steps.captionText: Run the design. The engine sizes everything from this schedule.
